title: oldenlandia johnstonii
intro: Oldenlandia johnstonii, also known as Johnston's grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, malaria, and skin infections. The health benefits of Oldenlandia johnstonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia johnstonii is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
